mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IV_INVENTORY ( gubun, product_code, vendor_code, product_id, reg_ymd, status, status_confirm, status_history_yn, error_msg, registration_name ) VALUES ( #{gubun}, #{productCode}, #{vendorCode}, #{productId}, #{regYmd}, #{status}, #{statusConfirm}, #{statusHistoryYn}, #{errorMsg}, #{registrationName} )

INSERT INTO IV_INVENTORY ( gubun, type, product_code, product_id, vendor_code, msds_no, product_name, company_name, tel, word, psc_apr, psc_matter, psc_color, psc_odour, psc_odour_threshold, psc_ph, psc_melting_point, psc_boling_point, psc_flash_point, psc_evaporation_rate, psc_flammable, psc_explosion_min, psc_explosion_max, psc_apor_pressure, psc_solubility, psc_vapour_density, psc_relative_density, psc_partition_coefficient, psc_auto_temperature, psc_decomposition_temperature, psc_viscosity, psc_molecular_weight, version, first_write_date, revision_date, reg_ymd, error_msg, status, status_confirm, status_history_yn, revision_yn, registration_name, active_yn ) VALUES ( #{gubun}, #{type}, #{productCode}, #{productId}, #{vendorCode}, #{msdsNo}, #{productName}, #{companyName}, #{tel}, #{word}, #{pscApr}, #{pscMatter}, #{pscColor}, #{pscOdour}, #{pscOdourThreshold}, #{pscPh}, #{pscMeltingPoint}, #{pscBoilingPoint}, #{pscFlashPoint}, #{pscEvaporationRate}, #{pscFlammable}, #{pscExplosionMin}, #{pscExplosionMax}, #{pscAporPressure}, #{pscSolubility}, #{pscVapourDensity}, #{pscRelativeDensity}, #{pscPartitionCoefficient}, #{pscAutoTemperature}, #{pscDecompositionTemperature}, #{pscViscosity}, #{pscMolecularWeight}, #{version}, #{firstWriteDate}, #{revisionDate}, #{regYmd}, #{errorMsg}, #{status}, #{statusConfirm}, #{statusHistoryYn}, #{revisionYn}, #{productCode}, #{productCode} )

INSERT INTO IV_INVENTORY_CHEMICAL ( ivi_regno, formula, chmical_name, cas_no, reg_no, percent, twa, oral, dermal, inhalation, inhalation_gas, inhalation_steam, inhalation_mist, skin_corrosion, eye_damage, respiratory_irritability, skin_sensitivity, mutagenicity, carcinogenicity, reproductive_toxicity, target_organ_toxicity_single, target_organ_toxicity_repeat, aspiration_hazard, ecotoxicity_fish, ecotoxicity_invert, ecotoxicity_algae, chronic_fish, chronic_invert, chronic_algae, persistence, degradability, bio_potential, bio_degradable, mobility_in_soil, hazardous_ozne, other_effect, national_exrpsure, acgih_reg, osha_reg, bio_reg, regul_1, regul_2, regul_3, regul_4, regul_5, regul_6, regul_7, regul_8, regul_9, regul_10, regul_11, regul_12, regul_13, regul_14, regul_14_1, regul_14_2, regul_14_3, regul_15, regul_16, regul_17, regul_18, regul_19, regul_20, regul_21, regul_22, regul_23, regul_24, regul_24_1, regul_24_2, regul_24_3, regul_24_4, regul_24_5, regul_24_6, regul_25, regul_26, regul_27, regul_28, regul_29, regul_30, reg_ymd, status ) VALUES
( #{item.iviRegno}, #{item.formula}, #{item.chmicalName}, #{item.casNo}, #{item.regNo}, #{item.percent}, #{item.twa}, #{item.oral}, #{item.dermal}, #{item.inhalation}, #{item.inhalationGas}, #{item.inhalationSteam}, #{item.inhalationMist}, #{item.skinCorrosion}, #{item.eyeDamage}, #{item.respiratoryIrritability}, #{item.skinSensitivity}, #{item.mutagenicity}, #{item.carcinogenicity}, #{item.reproductiveToxicity}, #{item.targetOrganToxicitySingle}, #{item.targetOrganToxicityRepeat}, #{item.aspirationHazard}, #{item.ecotoxicityFish}, #{item.ecotoxicityInvert}, #{item.ecotoxicityAlgae}, #{item.chronicFish}, #{item.chronicInvert}, #{item.chronicAlgae}, #{item.persistence}, #{item.degradability}, #{item.bioPotential}, #{item.bioDegradable}, #{item.mobilityInSoil}, #{item.hazardousOzne}, #{item.otherEffect}, #{item.nationalExrposure}, #{item.acgihReg}, #{item.oshaReg}, #{item.bioReg}, #{item.regul1}, #{item.regul2}, #{item.regul3}, #{item.regul4}, #{item.regul5}, #{item.regul6}, #{item.regul7}, #{item.regul8}, #{item.regul9}, #{item.regul10}, #{item.regul11}, #{item.regul12}, #{item.regul13}, #{item.regul14}, #{item.regul14_1}, #{item.regul14_2}, #{item.regul14_3}, #{item.regul15}, #{item.regul16}, #{item.regul17}, #{item.regul18}, #{item.regul19}, #{item.regul20}, #{item.regul21}, #{item.regul22}, #{item.regul23}, #{item.regul24}, #{item.regul24_1}, #{item.regul24_2}, #{item.regul24_3}, #{item.regul24_4}, #{item.regul24_5}, #{item.regul24_6}, #{item.regul25}, #{item.regul26}, #{item.regul27}, #{item.regul28}, #{item.regul29}, #{item.regul30}, CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d') AS UNSIGNED), 1 )

INSERT INTO IV_INVENTORY_PCODE (ivi_regno, type, content) VALUES
(#{item.iviRegno}, #{item.type} ,#{item.content})

INSERT INTO IV_INVENTORY_TRANSPORT ( ivi_regno, un_number, shipping_name, trans_hazard_class, packing_group, env_hazard, type_fire_action, type_still_action ) VALUES ( #{iviRegno}, #{unNumber}, #{shippingName}, #{transHazardClass}, #{packingGroup}, #{envHazard}, #{typeFireAction}, #{typeStillAction} )
INSERT INTO IV_INVENTORY_FILE ( ivi_regno, org_filename, file_name, status, reg_ymd ) VALUES ( #{iviRegno}, #{orgFilename}, #{fileName}, '1', CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d') AS UNSIGNED) )
mapper.update:
UPDATE IV_INVENTORY
gubun = #{gubun}, type = #{type}, product_code = #{productCode}, product_id = #{productId}, vendor_code = #{vendorCode}, msds_no = #{msdsNo}, product_name = #{productName}, company_name = #{companyName}, tel = #{tel}, word = #{word}, psc_apr = #{pscApr}, psc_matter = #{pscMatter}, psc_color = #{pscColor}, psc_odour = #{pscOdour}, psc_odour_threshold = #{pscOdourThreshold}, psc_ph = #{pscPh}, psc_melting_point = #{pscMeltingPoint}, psc_boling_point = #{pscBoilingPoint}, psc_flash_point = #{pscFlashPoint}, psc_evaporation_rate = #{pscEvaporationRate}, psc_flammable = #{pscFlammable}, psc_explosion_min = #{pscExplosionMin}, psc_explosion_max = #{pscExplosionMax}, psc_apor_pressure = #{pscAporPressure}, psc_solubility = #{pscSolubility}, psc_vapour_density = #{pscVapourDensity}, psc_relative_density = #{pscRelativeDensity}, psc_partition_coefficient = #{pscPartitionCoefficient}, psc_auto_temperature = #{pscAutoTemperature}, psc_decomposition_temperature = #{pscDecompositionTemperature}, psc_viscosity = #{pscViscosity}, psc_molecular_weight = #{pscMolecularWeight}, version = #{version}, first_write_date = #{firstWriteDate}, revision_date = #{revisionDate}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, status_confirm = #{statusConfirm}, status_history_yn = #{statusHistoryYn}, revision_yn = #{revisionYn}, registration_name = #{registrationName}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, status = #{status} WHERE ivi_regno = #{iviRegno}
